extendedQueries.sql: SELECT users_t.id, users_t.email, users_t.name, users_t.avatar_url AS "avatarUrl", users_t.role, users_t.status, users_t.is_deleted AS "isDeleted", users_t.metadata, users_t.tags, users_t."lastLoginAt", users_t."createdAt", users_t."updatedAt", COALESCE((SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('id', assignedtasks_0.id, 'title', assignedtasks_0.title, 'status', assignedtasks_0.status) ORDER BY assignedtasks_0.id ASC), '[]'::json) FROM "public"."tasks" assignedtasks_0 WHERE assignedtasks_0."assigneeId" = users_t.id), '[]'::json) AS "assignedTasks" FROM "public"."users" users_t ORDER BY users_t.id ASC LIMIT $1

prismaQueries.sql: SELECT "public"."users"."id", "public"."users"."email", "public"."users"."name", "public"."users"."avatar_url", "public"."users"."role", "public"."users"."status", "public"."users"."is_deleted", "public"."users"."metadata", "public"."users"."tags", "public"."users"."lastLoginAt", "public"."users"."createdAt", "public"."users"."updatedAt" FROM "public"."users" WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY "public"."users"."id" ASC LIMIT $1 OFFSET $2

SELECT "public"."tasks"."id", "public"."tasks"."title", "public"."tasks"."status"::text, "public"."tasks"."assigneeId" FROM "public"."tasks" WHERE "public"."tasks"."assigneeId" IN ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5) ORDER BY "public"."tasks"."id" ASC OFFSET $6

drizzleQueries.sql: select "pgUsers"."id", "pgUsers"."email", "pgUsers"."name", "pgUsers"."avatar_url", "pgUsers"."role", "pgUsers"."status", "pgUsers"."is_deleted", "pgUsers"."metadata", "pgUsers"."tags", "pgUsers"."lastLoginAt", "pgUsers"."createdAt", "pgUsers"."updatedAt", "pgUsers_assignedTasks"."data" as "assignedTasks" from "users" "pgUsers" left join lateral (select coalesce(json_agg(json_build_array("pgUsers_assignedTasks"."id", "pgUsers_assignedTasks"."title", "pgUsers_assignedTasks"."status") order by "pgUsers_assignedTasks"."id" asc), '[]'::json) as "data" from (select * from "tasks" "pgUsers_assignedTasks" where "pgUsers_assignedTasks"."assigneeId" = "pgUsers"."id" order by "pgUsers_assignedTasks"."id" asc) "pgUsers_assignedTasks") "pgUsers_assignedTasks" on true order by "pgUsers"."id" asc limit $1

extendedQueries.sql: SELECT tasks.id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.position, tasks."dueDate", tasks."completedAt", tasks."estimatedHours", tasks.metadata, tasks."createdAt", tasks."updatedAt", tasks."projectId", tasks."assigneeId", tasks."creatorId", tasks."milestoneId", tasks."parentId" FROM "public"."tasks" tasks WHERE tasks.position <= $1 ORDER BY tasks.id ASC

prismaQueries.sql: SELECT "public"."tasks"."id", "public"."tasks"."title", "public"."tasks"."description", "public"."tasks"."status"::text, "public"."tasks"."priority"::text, "public"."tasks"."position", "public"."tasks"."dueDate", "public"."tasks"."completedAt", "public"."tasks"."estimatedHours", "public"."tasks"."metadata", "public"."tasks"."createdAt", "public"."tasks"."updatedAt", "public"."tasks"."projectId", "public"."tasks"."assigneeId", "public"."tasks"."creatorId", "public"."tasks"."milestoneId", "public"."tasks"."parentId" FROM "public"."tasks" WHERE "public"."tasks"."position" <= $1 ORDER BY "public"."tasks"."id" ASC OFFSET $2

drizzleQueries.sql: select "id", "title", "description", "status", "priority", "position", "dueDate", "completedAt", "estimatedHours", "metadata", "createdAt", "updatedAt", "projectId", "assigneeId", "creatorId", "milestoneId", "parentId" from "tasks" where "tasks"."position" <= $1 order by "tasks"."id" asc
